Identification.LongTitle: An Act to amend the Immigration and Refugee Protection Act (medical inadmissibilityﾃ｢ﾂﾂｯﾃ｢ﾂﾂ氾｢ﾂﾂｯexcessive demand)
Identification.RunningHead: An Act to amend the Immigration and Refugee Protection Act (medical inadmissibilityﾃ｢ﾂﾂｯﾃ｢ﾂﾂ氾｢ﾂﾂｯexcessive demand)

Provision.Text: This enactment amends the Immigration and Refugee Protection Act in order to remove the health ground on which a foreign national is inadmissible if their health condition might reasonably be expected to cause excessive demand on health or social servﾃつｭices.
Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Section.Text: Section 38 of the Immigration and Refugee Protection Act is replaced by the following:
A foreign national is inadmissible on health grounds if their health condition is likely to be a danger to public health or public safety.
